title: Family Articles Capture — Quick Reference
kicker: Anything you read, anywhere, into your vault
subtitle: This is the family-wide cheat sheet for getting an article — paywalled or free, on any device — into your Obsidian vault. **Pick your device, pick your channel, follow the icon.**
